summary: FIDEM iteration 2 tested. Backend 43/43 pytest passing (26 regression + 17 new feature tests covering /files/upload+serve, filter enforcement, response-time tracking, block/report, 4 gift kinds, subscription auto-downgrade, marketing daily-cap, telegram webhook secret). Frontend new pages (/settings, /notifications) and Me page bell/photo/links all working. Critical UI miss: Chat 3-dot menu (chat-menu/chat-block/chat-report) is NOT rendered in Chat.jsx JSX despite imports/state existing.

minor.issue: Daily-cap correctly enforced (3rd run skipped > 0) but actually delivers real Telegram DMs to every onboarded user that has telegram_id — no dry-run flag, potential spam risk in prod.
8MB size check happens AFTER file.read(); a 100MB upload still buffers in memory before rejection. Consider streaming or Content-Length pre-check.
Auth via ?auth=<jwt> query parameter leaks token into server access logs / browser history. Acceptable as image src trade-off, but flag for review.

ui_bugs.issue: 3-dot menu (chat-menu) button and dropdown JSX completely missing from header. Imports (MoreVertical, Ban, Flag), state (menuOpen, setMenuOpen) and handlers (handleBlock, handleReport) exist, but no JSX renders them. Block/Report unreachable via UI.

issues: Email/Password/Name inputs and Login/Sign up buttons lack data-testid attributes (auth-email, auth-password, auth-submit, auth-toggle), making automated testing fragile (must rely on placeholders / text).

action_items: FIX: Render 3-dot menu in Chat.jsx header — add <button data-testid='chat-menu'> + dropdown containing <button data-testid='chat-block'> and <button data-testid='chat-report'> wired to existing handleBlock / handleReport handlers.
Add data-testid attributes to Auth.jsx form fields and submit/toggle buttons for stable automation.
Add Content-Length pre-check on /files/upload before reading body to prevent memory exhaustion from oversized uploads.
Consider adding a 'dry_run' flag to /admin/notification/broadcast so admins can preview reach before real Telegram DMs go out.
(Tech-debt from iter 1, still valid) Split server.py (1443 lines) into per-domain APIRouters; consolidate two-step $set in onboard/update_profile.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat.jsx imports MoreVertical/Ban/Flag and declares setMenuOpen state but never renders the menu — dead code + missing feature.
/files/upload reads entire body before size check (line 1163-1165 server.py) — should check Content-Length header first.

candidate_can_message uses has_children == ... comparison without is None guard for filter side (line 457): `if f.get('has_children') is not None and f['has_children'] != sender.get(...)` is fine, but `sender.get('has_children')` defaults to None which equals filter=False mismatch — needs explicit sender default False.
GET /api/files/{path} accepts ?auth= query token; ensure access logs scrub query strings or token rotation policy is in place.
Marketing broadcast loops users sequentially and awaits push_notif which awaits Telegram DM — O(N) latency, no batching/queue. Acceptable for current scale but flag.
server.py is now 1443 lines — well over 700-line guideline; split into routers urgently.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py (new file, 17 tests covering all new endpoints)

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (settings/notifications/me/gift modal all work; chat 3-dot menu missing)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@fidem.uz / Admin@123. Runtime test users registered with random suffix.
seed_data_creation: None. Backend auto-seeds 1 admin + 14 demo users on startup. Tests rely on that.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully covered by 43 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/. The only frontend feature gap is Chat.jsx 3-dot menu (chat-menu/chat-block/chat-report) — handlers + imports exist, JSX missing. After main agent fixes that, retest /chat/<chat_id> on a real chat (use API to send a message first) and verify menu opens with both action buttons. All other new features (settings filter persistence with set-agemin/set-region/set-req-verified, /notifications page, gift modal with 4 options, photo upload data-testid me-photo-upload, link-notifications, link-settings, response-speed selector hidden when avg_response_min is null) verified working.
rca of the issue: Chat 3-dot menu missing — Root cause: developer added all the supporting code (imports of MoreVertical/Ban/Flag icons, useState menuOpen/setMenuOpen, async handleBlock/handleReport that call /api/messages/block and /api/messages/report and then call setMenuOpen(false)) but forgot to add the JSX for the <button data-testid='chat-menu'> + dropdown panel inside the sticky header (Chat.jsx line ~90-105). Repro: log in, open any /chat/<id>, header only shows back arrow + avatar/name — no 3-dot icon. Mitigation: insert button right after the <Link to=/candidate/...> link in the header that toggles menuOpen, and a conditional dropdown div rendering two buttons with data-testid='chat-block' (onClick=handleBlock) and data-testid='chat-report' (onClick=handleReport).
